title: Guild/channel state model
description: Design and implement the Agora guild and channel data model. A guild is a named collection of channels with a member list and admin set. A channel is a named message stream within a guild with a mode (interactive/community/broadcast) and MLS group binding. State is represented as signed JSON blobs (GuildState, ChannelState) stored content-addressed. Covers: core data structures in agora-core, relay storage (SQLite tables), relay API endpoints for guild CRUD, CLI commands for guild/channel management, and MLS group creation tied to channel creation.
